_metadata.description: Authenticity audit of all MCP tools in tree-sitter-analyzer v2

categories.REAL: Core functionality works, uses real backends (tree-sitter/fd/rg/git/etc), returns meaningful results
categories.PARTIAL: Basic functionality works but has significant limitations, misleading name, or incomplete logic
categories.STUB: Fake implementation - pass-only body, NotImplementedError, or only returns hardcoded data

analyze_code_structure.notes: Full multi-language code structure analysis with TOON/JSON output

find_files.notes: Fast file search with glob patterns, extensions, size filters

search_content.notes: Full-featured content search with regex, context, grouping, total_only

query_code.notes: Supports predefined keys (methods, classes) and custom query strings

check_code_scale.notes: Complexity analysis, structural overview, LLM guidance, batch mode

find_and_grep.notes: Combines file finding with content search

extract_code_section.notes: Supports batch extraction, multiple output formats, file saving

analyze_code_graph.notes: Python/Java support, single-file and directory analysis, cross-file resolution

find_function_callers.notes: Finds callers of a function across files

visualize_code_graph.backend: Mermaid diagram generation from code graph
visualize_code_graph.notes: Generates Mermaid flowcharts for code relationships

write_file.notes: Safe file writing with directory creation

delete_file.notes: Supports files, directories, recursive deletion, batch operations

batch_operations.notes: Rename, move, copy, change_extension, add_prefix, add_suffix

refactor_rename.notes: Single-file and cross-file renaming. Regex-based, not tree-sitter-aware

analyze_dependencies.notes: Scans all .py files for import statements

generate_api_docs.notes: Generates API docs for entire packages

git_diff.notes: Supports staged changes and file-specific diffs

init_project.notes: Creates basic Python project structure with pyproject.toml

analyze_project.notes: Basic project statistics (files, lines, test ratio)

security_scan.notes: Detects hardcoded secrets and dangerous functions (eval/exec)

calculate_metrics.notes: LOC breakdown, function/class counts, maintainability index

change_detector.notes: Detects added, modified, deleted files between scans

code_reviewer.notes: Automated code review checking naming, complexity, docstrings

profile_code.notes: Misleading name: claims profiling but only counts lines and function names. Does NOT run cProfile or any real profiler.
profile_code.improvement: Use cProfile or py-spy for actual profiling

generate_tests.notes: Generates basic pytest templates from source. Templates are generic.
generate_tests.improvement: Generate more specific tests based on function signatures and types

generate_mocks.improvement: Use unittest.mock patterns, generate from protocol/interface

generate_class.improvement: Add dataclass support, method stubs from interface

pattern_recognizer.notes: Basic detection of singleton, factory, observer patterns via AST. Heuristic-based, not comprehensive.
pattern_recognizer.improvement: Use tree-sitter for multi-language support, add more patterns

duplicate_detector.notes: Compares function AST dumps for exact duplicates. Won't detect near-duplicates.

smell_detector.notes: Detects long methods, deep nesting, too many parameters. Basic heuristics.
smell_detector.improvement: Add more smell types, configurable thresholds

improvement_suggester.notes: Basic suggestions based on code patterns
improvement_suggester.improvement: More actionable suggestions with code examples

best_practice_checker.notes: Checks basic practices (docstrings, type hints, naming)

comment_manager.notes: Manages TODO/FIXME comments in code. Basic extraction only.
comment_manager.improvement: Track comment resolution, integrate with issue trackers

task_manager.notes: In-memory task tracking, no persistence between sessions
task_manager.improvement: Add persistence, integrate with project management tools

shell_executor.notes: Executes shell commands with timeout. Security concern: no sandboxing.
shell_executor.improvement: Add command whitelist, sandboxing, output size limits

graph_storage.notes: CRUD operations on graph nodes/edges. No persistence.

code_query.notes: Custom query language for graph. Limited query capabilities.
code_query.improvement: Support more complex queries, add documentation

realtime_watch.notes: Has stub method _update_file_in_graph (pass-only body). Watch mechanism incomplete.

graph_visualize.improvement: Add more visualization formats, interactive output

instant_understand.notes: Has stub __init__ (pass-only). Delegates to engine which may work but tool initialization is incomplete.

compare_projects.improvement: Implement proper __init__, add meaningful comparison metrics

cache_manager.notes: Basic file-level caching. Cache invalidation may not be reliable.
cache_manager.improvement: Add TTL, proper invalidation, cache size limits

incremental_analyzer.notes: Analyzes only changed files. Depends on ChangeDetectorTool state.
incremental_analyzer.improvement: Add proper state management, integrate with code graph
